name: Portfolio Interest Tax Exclusion for Foreign Corporations

eligibility.description: Applies to interest on obligations in registered form where the recipient is not a 10-percent shareholder, not a bank lending in the ordinary course, and not a related controlled foreign corporation.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes U.S. source portfolio interest from the 30% flat tax normally imposed on foreign corporations not engaged in a U.S. trade or business.
